summary: P3 Features Testing - Enhanced Demographic Filtering and Global Pattern Engine. Fixed a bug where age_range and cohabitation_status were not being stored in session baseline_data. All 16 backend tests passed and frontend UI tests verified.

bug_fixed.issue: age_range and cohabitation_status were accepted by BaselineInput model but NOT stored in baseline_data dict
bug_fixed.fix: Added age_range and cohabitation_status to baseline_data dict in submit_baseline function

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/analysis/start returns session_id (deep analysis)
Backend: POST /api/analysis/baseline accepts optional age_range and cohabitation_status
Backend: POST /api/analysis/baseline works WITHOUT age_range/cohabitation_status (backward compatible)
Backend: POST /api/analysis/baseline accepts all age_range values (18-25, 25-35, 35-45, 45-55, 55+)
Backend: POST /api/analysis/baseline accepts all cohabitation_status values (living_together, living_apart, part_time)
Backend: GET /api/cases/stats returns total_cases, user_contributed, seeded counts
Backend: POST /api/cases/contribute-from-session with valid outcome returns accepted/case_id
Backend: POST /api/cases/contribute-from-session rejects invalid outcome with 400
Backend: POST /api/cases/contribute-from-session returns already_contributed on duplicate
Backend: POST /api/cases/contribute-from-session returns 400 for missing fields
Backend: POST /api/cases/contribute-from-session returns 404 for invalid session
Backend: Full analysis flow produces results with demographic filtering (case_comparison.demographic_filtered)
Backend: POST /api/auth/login returns token for syscheck@test.com
Backend: POST /api/auth/register creates new user
Backend: GET /api/auth/my-analyses returns enhanced data with analyses array
Backend: GET /api/ returns active status (health check)
Backend: POST /api/analysis/conversation-coach/pdf returns valid PDF
Frontend: Landing page loads with hero headline 'Is my partner cheating'
Frontend: Pink CTA 'Start Relationship Analysis' button visible and clickable
Frontend: Deep Analysis baseline form shows 'Your age range' selector (data-testid='age-range-select')
Frontend: Deep Analysis baseline form shows 'Living situation' selector (data-testid='cohabitation-select')
Frontend: Baseline form accepts and displays selected age_range (25-35)
Frontend: Baseline form accepts and displays selected cohabitation (Living together)
Frontend: Changes page shows change categories with checkmarks
Frontend: Investigation page shows core analysis questions
Frontend: Conversation Coach page loads with tone/topic selectors
critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 1102-1123: submit_baseline now correctly stores age_range and cohabitation_status in baseline_data
server.py line 1629-1707: contribute_from_session extracts anonymized data from session and adds to case database
server.py line 1710-1715: get_case_stats returns total, user_contributed, and seeded counts
server.py line 906-949: compare_with_case_database applies multi-dimensional demographic filtering with graceful fallback
DeepAnalysis.jsx line 286-327: New age_range and cohabitation selectors in baseline form
ResultsDashboard.jsx line 1481-1557: Contribute section with outcome buttons and confirm button
api.js line 173-184: contributeCase and getCaseStats functions
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed users during registration tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: P3 features fully tested: (1) Enhanced Demographic Filtering - age_range and cohabitation_status optional fields now properly stored in baseline_data and used in demographic filtering during pattern comparison. (2) Global Pattern Engine - POST /api/cases/contribute-from-session auto-extracts anonymized data from completed sessions. GET /api/cases/stats returns total/contributed/seeded counts. Frontend contribute section appears at stage 12+ in ResultsDashboard with outcome buttons. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_p3_demographic_and_contribute.py (16 tests). Fixed bug in server.py submit_baseline function that wasn't storing demographic fields.
